english_text:
Cycle (Daur)
Qa'im of the Cycle
Six Forms
400,000 Years = (50,000 + 7000) × 7 = 399,000 + 1,000
342,000
57000
alt_text: Mirror of image 010 but at the larger cycle scale: six numbered chairs (1-6, each labeled 57000) at the top, totaling 342,000 with the side annotation 'ستۃ صورات' (Six Forms). Arrows converge on a seventh chair labeled '7' (57000) captioned 'قائم دور' (Qa'im of the Cycle). Math at top: 400,000 Years = (50,000 + 7000) × 7 = 399,000 + 1,000.
notes: Larger-scale analogue of image 010. While image 010 decomposes the 50,000-year Daur-e-Kashf, this image decomposes the 400,000-year Daur. Each 'chair' (57,000 years) represents one combined Kashf+Sitr cycle (50,000 + 7000).
